results.rendered_html:
anāśaka a. [na ā samyak yathecchaṃ āśaḥ aśanaṃ yasya, na nāśo yasya vā, na. ba. kap] Devoid of full enjoyment or indestructible, not hurtful.
— kaṃ Fast, abstaining from eating even to death; yajñena dānena tapasā'nāśakenaitameva viditvā munirbhavati  Bṛ. Ār. Up. ;  Y. 3. 154.
